headline: 3M’s AI Data Center Push Raises Questions On Value And Execution
summary: 3M (NYSE:MMM) has joined an industry coalition to establish open standards for expanded beam optical connectivity in AI data centers. The company is participating in a multi-source agreement alongside major technology firms to define interoperable specifications for next generation AI infrastructure. For a company best known for materials, electronics and industrial solutions, this move puts 3M closer to the core plumbing of AI data centers. Open, interoperable optical connections can...
